__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Locomotion No.1,History of the Peloponnesian War,Hanuman Statue,Hoysala Dynasty Dancer Statue,Orestes
|rank=orange
|amount=5
|category=minion
|description=All Dragon Minion Skins, HARD Stats +100%
}}
[[Category:Minion]]
[[Category:Minion Skin Boost]]
[[Category:Dragon Minion HARD Boost]]
